title: The Simulacra
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A 1964 novel set in a future United States where the president is a simulacrum (android) and real power is held by a secret elite. Dick weaves together multiple storylines involving time travel, psychokinesis, and Martian emigration into a complex political satire about the artificiality of power. 222 pages.
